messages.content:
customer:"I order 2 squismallow last night and I got and email saying that they cancel my order and I want to know why
Please call me"
our macro for that:
 I am so sorry to inform you that that your most recent pick-up order R231233350 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days

 I apologize we could not fulfill your order! 

please create a script concise and simple for csr response call based on the given context

Hello,

This is [Your Name] from [Company Name], and I'm calling in response to your recent order of the two Squishmallows. I'm really sorry, but I have to confirm that your order R231233350 was indeed canceled. Unfortunately, we had an inventory mistake, and we didn't realize the items were out of stock until we went to prepare your order.

I assure you we haven't charged you for the order. If you're seeing a charge, it's likely just an authorization hold that will be released back into your account within the next 2-5 business days.

My apologies for the inconvenience this has caused you. If there's anything else I can assist you with or if you have further questions, feel free to ask during this call.

Thank you.

<new customer>

customer:" I ordered for pick up at store on 12/19/2023 around 10am. I haven’t received any emails regarding my order. If the items are out of stock, then refund me immediately and let me purchase somewhere else! It said my order will be ready by 4pm YESTERDAY! No emails saying it’s ready for pick up or out of stock!  "

email confirmation macro:"  I'm sorry that you have not received any notification emails about order.

I checked our system & your order is ready for pick up at the below Five Below location. Please be sure to bring a photo ID that matches the name that is on the order or show the store team this email thread:

08129 805 COLUMBUS AVE-NYC, NY
805 COLUMBUS AVE
MANHATTAN, NY 10025

Your Pickup Number Is: H22624866175

Customers have 72 hours to pick up their orders before the order is automatically canceled and payment is voided."

however some of the items were cancelled  to an inventory error that we were not aware of until the store attempted to fulfill your order.    

please inform customer about it and also inform the items that were available for pick up and the items that were not for example: items for pick up available: <images>

for example: The other items that they did not have in stock were removed from your order and you were not charged for them

If you are seeing a pending charge for the original amount, it will fall off in the next few days!

Hello [Customer's Name],

I'm reaching out from [Company Name] regarding your recent order that you placed for in-store pickup on December 19th at 10 am. I sincerely apologize for the lack of communication you've experienced about your order status.

I've checked our system and I'm pleased to inform you that a portion of your order is indeed ready for pickup at our [specified store location]: Five Below located at 805 Columbus Ave, Manhattan, NY 10025. Your Pickup Number is: H22624866175. When you arrive, please ensure you have your photo ID that matches the name on the order or this email thread to present to our store team.

Regarding the full order, I regret to inform you that due to an unforeseen inventory error, some items were unavailable at the time your order was fulfilled, and they were removed from your order. You were not charged for these items, so there is no need to worry about seeking a refund for them. I’m attaching images of the items that are available for you to pick up.

[Include images or descriptions of available items]

As for the items that were not in stock and thus canceled from your order, please rest assured that if you noticed a pending charge on your account for the original order amount, this will automatically be adjusted and should fall off within the next few days.

We understand this may cause you some inconvenience and we truly apologize. You have a 72-hour window to collect the available items from the store, starting now, before the order would be subject to automatic cancellation.

If you have any further concerns or require assistance, please feel free to contact us directly. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
[Company Name] Customer Service Team

<new customer context>
customer:"Hi, I placed an online order for in store pick up yesterday but most of my items were out of stock. Is it possible to go ahead and cancel the three items that were in stock?"

please apologize to the customer first that the items were out of stock so it was cancelled this was due to an inventory error that the team were not aware of untill they went to fulfill your order.

and then apologize that we cannot cancel the pick up in store order once placed:"Apologies that we're unable to cancel Pick Up orders once they have been placed.    However, if you don't pick up your order within 3 days, it will automatically cancel and the pending payment will be voided.  



You will see the charge drop off within 2-5 business days after the system voids that payment. "

Hello [Customer's Name],

I'm truly sorry to hear that most of the items you ordered for in-store pickup were out of stock. This was due to an inventory discrepancy that our team did not detect until the time came to prepare your order. We deeply regret the inconvenience this has caused you.

Regarding the three items that were in stock, I apologize for the inconvenience, but we are unable to cancel Pick Up orders once they have been placed. However, I want to offer you a solution: if you choose not to collect your order from the store within 3 days, please know that it will automatically be canceled. Once the order is canceled, any pending payments will also be voided.

You can expect to see the charge removed from your account within 2-5 business days following the automatic cancellation by our system.

We are sorry for any confusion or difficulty this may have caused and appreciate your understanding. Should you have any further questions or need additional assistance, please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

customer was asking for an update on her status. found out that the order is cancelled :"We discovered an inventory error that our store team was not aware of when they tried to fulfill your order.""

customer thanked me but wondering why it wasn't notifiied: "Thanks  Why was I not notified ? I had to query this status."

apologize to the customer for the lack of communication etc. whichever works best for empathy

Hello [Customer's Name],

Firstly, I want to thank you for bringing this to our attention. I'm truly sorry to hear you were not notified about the cancellation of your order. It's entirely understandable that you'd expect to receive timely updates regarding your purchase, and the fact that you had to reach out to us for an explanation is not the level of service we aim to provide.

We strive to promptly inform our customers of any changes to their orders, but it appears that we fell short in this instance. Please accept my sincerest apologies for any inconvenience the lack of communication may have caused you. We are looking into why a notification was not sent to ensure this does not happen again in the future.

Your experience is important to us, and we value your patience and understanding as we work to resolve these issues. Please know that we are here to help with any further concerns or questions you may have.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

<new customer context>

customer:" I went to go pick up my order and the employee said they cannot find my order."

upon checking the pick up order is cancelled due to inventory error.

our macro for that:"
I am so sorry to inform you that your most recent pick-up order R814354312 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! 
"

please also tell customer that because of this cancellation it might be the reason why the order did not go through to the store and the employees did not see the order im sorry for the inconvenience etc.

Hello [Customer's Name],

I am truly sorry for the confusion and inconvenience you experienced when you went to pick up your order. After reviewing your situation, it's become clear that your pick-up order R814354312 was unfortunately canceled due to an inventory error. Our store team was not made aware of this discrepancy until they tried to gather the items for your order, which is why they couldn't locate it when you arrived.

Because of this unforeseen cancellation, it's likely that your order did not properly process through to the store's system, which is why the employees were unable to find any record of it. I sincerely apologize for this oversight and for any trouble it has caused you.

Please be assured that we have not charged your payment method for this canceled order. If you're seeing any related charges, those are pending and should be released back to you within 2-5 business days.

Again, I'm very sorry that we couldn't fulfill your order on this occasion. We appreciate your understanding and are grateful for your patience as we work to prevent such incidents in the future. If there's anything more we can do to assist you, or if you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

<new customer context>
customer's order has two sort of orders. 4 items for pick up at central plaza and another 4 items for pick up at pelham manor shopping center.

items for pick up at central plaza were cancelled. :"I am so sorry that your most recent pick-up items for pick up at CENTRAL PLAZA from order R144283909 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   



We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days."

please add after that the items for pick up at pelham are available and ready for pick up at <location of store>

with shipment number <number>. "Please be sure to bring a photo ID that matches the name that is on the order or show the store team this email thread:



[ENTER STORE ADDRESS HERE]



Your Pickup Number Is: [ENTER PICK UP NUMBER HERE]

Customers have 72 hours to pick up their orders before the order is automatically canceled and payment is voided."

unfortunately only 1 item is also available for pick up on pelham other items were cancelled due to inventory error still. inform customer that the he/she won't be charged for those and only will be charged for the item that are available for pick up.

Hello [Customer's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I regret to inform you that there was an issue with part of your recent order R144283909. Specifically, the items that were scheduled for pick-up at CENTRAL PLAZA have unfortunately been canceled due to an unexpected inventory error in our store system. This oversight was not recognized until our team at the location attempted to prepare your purchase for pickup.

Please rest assured that we have not processed any charges to your payment method for these canceled items. Should you see any pending charges, they are indeed temporary and will be removed from your account within the next 2-5 business days.

On a positive note, I am pleased to confirm that the items designated for pick-up at the Pelham Manor Shopping Center are available and are ready for you to collect. However, I must inform you that likewise, due to an inventory error, we were only able to fulfill one of the items from this part of your order. Here are the details for the ready collection:

[INSERT STORE ADDRESS AT PELHAM MANOR SHOPPING CENTER HERE]

Your Pickup Number is: [ENTER PICK UP NUMBER HERE]

When you arrive at the store, please ensure you have your photo ID that matches the name on the order, or this email thread, to show to our store team.

I would also like to clarify that you will only be charged for the single item that is available for pick up. The other items from both locations that could not be fulfilled due to our inventory error will not incur any cost to you.

You have 72 hours from now to pick up your available item, and if not collected, the order will be automatically canceled, and any related payment will be voided accordingly.

We're very sorry for the inconvenience caused by these errors and the additional effort required on your behalf. Thank you for your understanding and for choosing to shop with us. If you have any more concerns or require further assistance, please don't hesitate to contact our customer service.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

<new customer>
customer wanted to cancel an order. almost cancelled the order 'cause  the customer follow up with nevermind no cancel

Hello [Your Name] here,

Thank you for reaching out to our customer service team with your request to cancel your order. Upon receiving your initial message, we were preparing to process the cancellation; however, we've received your follow-up message indicating that you've changed your mind and would no longer like to cancel the order.

We have not proceeded with the cancellation, and your order will continue to be processed as originally planned. If there's anything else you would like to update or if you have any further instructions for us, please let us know as soon as possible, and we'll do our best to accommodate your needs.

If you have any additional questions or need further assistance with your order or anything else, don't hesitate to reach out. Our goal is to ensure you have a satisfying experience with our services.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

customer:"I placed a pickup order early this morning and I got confirmation but when I called the store bc I hadn’t received an email that it was ready they said they didn’t have it and I needed to contact yall bc they couldn’t do anything."

macro for that:"
I am so sorry to inform you that your most recent pick-up order R205694292 was canceled!  This was due to an inventory error that our store team was not aware of until they attempted to fulfill your order.   

We have not charged your payment method due to the cancellation.  Any charge(s) that you see should be pending and will clear within 2-5 business days.

I apologize we could not fulfill your order! 
"

also add that it is probably the main reason why the store could not fulfill the order

Hello [Customer's Name],

I'm reaching out regarding the confusion with your recent pickup order R205694292. I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this has caused you. Upon checking, it appears that your order was unfortunately canceled due to an inventory error. Our store team wasn't aware of this issue until they went to prepare your items, which is likely why they were unable to find your order when you called.

We want to ensure you that we have not charged your payment method, as the order has been canceled. Any charges that may appear on your account are pending and will be cleared within the next 2-5 business days.

I apologize for the mix-up and for the fact that we could not fulfill your order. This is also probably the main reason the store was unable to process your pickup request when you inquired. I understand how frustrating this situation must be, and we are taking steps to prevent such occurrences in the future.

If there is anything else you need help with or if you have any more questions, please feel free to contact us. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
Customer Service Team
[Company Name]

To calculate the monthly income from an annual salary of $409,756, divide the total by 12 months:

$409,756 per year / 12 months per year = $34,146.33 per month

So the monthly income would be approximately $34,146.33.
